subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification are meet and befitting unto the Self-Subsisting Lord and Sovereign of the invisible and visible realms, that sanctified Essence, Who hath caused the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنای حضرت قیوم و مالک غیب و شهود ذات اقدسش را لایق و سزاست که عالم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Hands of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @being a source of light; guidance, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
